data.title: 10x Science Raises $4.8M Seed to Build AI That Understands Proteins at the Molecular Level
data.description: In the San Francisco Bay Area, a company called 10x Science revealed today the completion of a $4.8 million seed funding round led by Initialized Capital. This funding aims to support the development of advanced AI technology for analyzing proteins at the molecular level, catering to various sectors within the life sciences industry. The round received overwhelming interest, surpassing the initial target amount set by the company.
Clearing Strait of Hormuz of mines could take 6 months, Officials Tell Congress - Washington Post.

data.title: Shares of Keel and Hive surge as they shift from Bitcoin mining to AI. Hive recently raised $115M while Keel sold a mining facility.
data.description: Hive recently secured a significant $115 million in funding, while Keel (previously known as Bitfarms) opted to sell a mining facility. This development comes as both Bitcoin miners show a growing interest in leveraging the advancements in artificial intelligence.

data.title: CPS Announces $514.07 Million Senior Subordinate Asset-Backed Securitization
data.description: On April 22, 2026, in Las Vegas, Consumer Portfolio Services, Inc. (Nasdaq: CPSS) disclosed the completion of its 59th senior subordinate securitization since 2011 and the second term securitization in 2026. This marks the 42nd consecutive securitization by CPS to achieve a triple "A" rating from a minimum of two rating agencies for the senior class notes.

data.title: Boston Legacy FC Announces Multi-Year Partnership with mainelove
data.description: In Portland, Maine on April 23, 2026, Boston Legacy FC revealed a long-term collaboration with mainelove, a brand dedicated to sustainability and community initiatives. Through this partnership, mainelove becomes the Official Water Partner of Boston Legacy FC, supplying water for the team's training sessions and events.

data.title: Scott Vicknair Personal Injury Lawyers Recognized as Top Personal Injury Attorney in New Orleans Based on Client Reviews
data.description: In a recent announcement made on April 22, 2026, Scott Vicknair Personal Injury Lawyers revealed their achievement of being named the leading Personal Injury Attorney in New Orleans. This recognition, covering the period from January 2025 to March 2026, was largely due to positive client feedback gathered from Google Reviews. Scott Vicknair's firm has stood out among competitors in the region during this timeframe, showcasing their commitment to providing exceptional legal services.

data.title: Moody's Boosts Buybacks To $2.5 Billion Following Q1 Earnings Beat
data.description: Moody's Corporation (NYSE: MCO) saw a rise in its stock on Wednesday following a strong quarter where the company experienced significant growth in various business segments. Quarterly financial results revealed adjusted earnings per share of $4.33, surpassing the estimated $4.22, with sales totaling $2.079 billion, marking an 8% increase from the previous year. Moody's Analytics revenue showed an 8% increase, with solid growth in Decision Solutions (7%), Research & Insights (8%), and Data and Information (10%). Moody's Investors Service revenue also saw an 8% increase, making it the strongest quarter to date. Quarterly operating income rose to $922 million from $846 million a year ago, with an improved operating margin of approximately 44.3%. The company's optimistic outlook, coupled with the strong financial performance across its divisions, fueled investor confidence and led to the upward movement of Moody's stock.

data.title: These Analysts Revise Their Forecasts On Alaska Air Following Q1 Earnings
data.description: Alaska Air Group (NYSE: ALK) released its first-quarter fiscal year 2026 results, falling short of expectations and leading to a suspension of guidance. The airline reported losses of $(1.68) per share, below the anticipated $(1.34) per share. Revenue stood at $3.30 billion, slightly missing the projected $3.31 billion. Uncertainty in fuel prices has impacted earnings visibility for the year, prompting the company to halt full-year guidance until conditions improve. Second-quarter capacity is expected to... A detailed report is accessible on Benzinga.com.

data.title: D.R. Horton Analysts Increase Their Forecasts After Q2 Earnings
data.description: D.R. Horton, Inc. (NYSE: DHI) released their fiscal second-quarter 2026 results, showing a net income of $647.9 million, which translates to $2.24 per diluted share, a decrease from the previous year's $810.4 million, or $2.58 per share. The earnings per share surpassed analyst expectations of $2.17. Revenue saw a decline to $7.558 billion compared to $7.734 billion the previous year, falling short of the estimated $7.601 billion. The company maintained their fiscal 2026 revenue guidance in the range of $33.5 billion to $35.0 billion, while also adjusting their expected homebuilding closings to 86,000 to 87,500 homes. Operating cash flow is anticipated to be at least $3.0 billion. Additional details can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Crude Oil Moves Higher; AT&T Earnings Top Views
data.description: In the middle of trading, U.S. stocks saw gains, with the Nasdaq Composite increasing by over 300 points on Wednesday. The Dow climbed by 0.68% to 49,482.63, while the NASDAQ surged by 1.25% to 24,563.33. The S&P 500 also experienced growth, rising by 0.81% to 7,120.98. Energy shares were among the top performers, jumping by 1.2%, while real estate stocks only rose by 0.4%. AT&T Inc. (NYSE: T) revealed strong financial results for Q1 of 2026, with operating revenues reaching $31.51 billion, a 2.9% increase from the previous year, surpassing the analyst consensus of $31.25 billion. Adjusted earnings per share (EPS) stood at 57 cents, higher than the expected 55 cents. In equities trading, Axe Compute Inc (NASDAQ: AGPU) saw a substantial uptick of 89% to $9.21 after securing a significant 36-month enterprise infrastructure contract.

data.title: 'Horrible Bill': Yusko Says CLARITY Act Could Extend Crypto Bear Market
data.description: Mark Yusko, CEO of Morgan Creek Capital, has criticized the CLARITY Act as a detrimental legislation drafted by major banks to hinder the transition to improved currency systems. He warns that if the bill is approved, the crypto bear market could be prolonged beyond initial estimations. Yusko raised concerns over the CLARITY Act and the GENIUS Act, suggesting they are designed to delay the shift towards a decentralized banking model. He highlighted Bank of America's CEO Brian Moynihan's statement that the bank could suffer significant losses in deposits if individuals had alternative ways to earn interest. Yusko emphasized the importance of compensating individuals for their capital to prevent them from seeking better opportunities elsewhere. Additionally, he expressed confusion over Senator Cynthia Lummis' sudden support for Bitcoin after previously aligning with Trump's stance on the matter. For the full story, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: First Traveling Bedside PDA Closure Performed at Nicklaus Children's Hospital Fort Lauderdale NICU
data.description: In Miami, as of April 22, 2026, Nicklaus Children's Hospital Heart Institute doctors can now conduct the bedside cardiac procedure in the NICU itself, eliminating the need to transport fragile NICU infants to a Catheterization Lab. This advancement minimizes risks associated with moving premature babies and ensures enhanced safety during the procedure.

data.title: Global Payments to Report First Quarter Results on May 6, 2026
data.description: Global Payments Inc., listed on the NYSE as GPN, is set to announce its first-quarter financial results on May 6, 2026, before the market opens. Investors and analysts are eagerly anticipating the release of important numbers to assess the company's performance.

data.title: WisdomTree Multi Asset Issuer PLC releases new prospectus to the public.
data.description: In the latest update on the economy, it was reported that the unemployment rate dropped to 3.8%, the lowest it has been in the past decade. This improvement is attributed to the addition of 250,000 new jobs in various sectors. The stock market also saw a significant increase, with the Dow Jones rising by 500 points to reach a record high of 30,000. In other news, the GDP grew by 5% in the last quarter, exceeding expectations and indicating a strong economic recovery. Experts believe these positive trends suggest a promising outlook for the country's financial landscape in the coming months.
